notes: All protocol roles are controlled by the Agent contract, ensuring veCRV holders maintain control over gauges, fees, and protocol expansion.

evidence.name: Gauge Addition
evidence.summary: Only the Agent can add new gauges via add_gauge on GaugeController.

evidence.name: Pool Factory Ownership
evidence.summary: New pools are deployed by Factory contracts controlled by OwnerProxy. Agent is responsible for adding new pools, giving veCRV holders control over protocol expansion.

urls.name: Curve Pool Factory: admin is OwnerProxy
